## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Environment

- **Python**: (e.g., 3.11.5)
- **Model Tier**: (Lite / Standard / Premium)
- **RAM**: (e.g., 8 GB)
- **GPU**: (e.g., Apple M2, NVIDIA RTX 3060, None)

Paste any relevant error messages or screenshots.
